title: CHEETAH SKULL
summary: Photoreal cheetah skull asset study, bone surface detail, warm studio lighting, and material breakup for portfolio lookdev.
problem: Deliver an anatomically convincing skull asset with readable bone wear and tooth detail under controlled studio lighting.
approach: Sculpted anatomy and micro surface variation in ZBrush, textured bone, enamel, and cavity grime in Substance Painter, then lit and rendered in Blender for final comp.
outcome: Hero stills and supporting angles packaged for asset design portfolio and client pitch use.

process.caption: Reference board for anatomy, bone surface detail, and skull proportions.
Anatomy sculpted in ZBrush with proportion checks against reference.
